texto: It's not about something i have felt, It's about my life;it's not about something that i have not, Its' about something inside me;It's not about that i am gonna cry It's about something that i have no tears left;It's not about something that i love you, It's about you don't..
explicacao: Citação de ravi nawandhar sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It's not about something i have felt, It's about my life;it's not about something that i have not…” articula reflexao, love-hurts, about em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
